name: dokime
description: A structured development workflow with human checkpoints — surfaces silent assumptions before they become code. Dokime: proven character through trial.

test_command.title: Test Command
test_command.description: Command to run tests (e.g., php artisan test, yarn test, pytest)

test_filter_flag.title: Test Filter Flag
test_filter_flag.description: Flag to filter tests by name (e.g., --filter for PHPUnit, --grep for Jest)

lint_command.title: Lint Command
lint_command.description: Command to run linter/formatter (e.g., pint, eslint, prettier)

static_analysis_command.title: Static Analysis Command
static_analysis_command.description: Command to run static analysis (e.g., phpstan analyse, tsc --noEmit)

codesniffer_command.title: Code Sniffer Command
codesniffer_command.description: Command to run code sniffer / structural linting (e.g., phpcs, eslint). Catches issues formatters miss — trailing commas, docblock annotations, unused imports.

base_branch.title: Base Branch
base_branch.description: Branch to create feature branches from (e.g., qa, develop, main)

stakeholders.title: Stakeholders
stakeholders.description: Comma-separated list of stakeholder names for ambiguity surfacing

specialized_agents.title: Specialized Agents
specialized_agents.description: Comma-separated list of specialized agent paths for code quality review
